ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., Full Time, Contract) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits eligibility code */,
  "compensation" REAL /* Annual compensation amount */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Employee performance rating */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title assigned to the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Name of emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health, Dental) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Description of the benefit coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Employee goals and objectives for the next review period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee whose compensation is recorded */,
  "compensation" REAL /* Amount of annual compensation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when this compensation became effective */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Amount of annual bonus */,
  "stock_options" REAL /* Number of stock options granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR, Manager, Employee) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked on this day */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave taken (e.g., Vacation, Sick) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the job title */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed list of job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_job_titles" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the job assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the job assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_titles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_job_titles_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments_benefits" (
  "department_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the department benefit record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit available */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or conditions regarding the benefit */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_benefits_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee whose status is changing */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the employee (e.g., Full Time, Contract) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_status_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compensation band */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title associated with the band */,
  "min_salary" REAL /* Minimum salary in the band */,
  "max_salary" REAL /* Maximum salary in the band */,
  "bonus_percent" REAL /* Bonus percentage for the band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_bands_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target completion date for the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the training provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
